item.title: Trash Cans in the East Cameron Bike Lane
item.description:
A Small Sample of Bike Lane Blockages

I started counting trash and recycling bins in the East Cameron bike lane when I realized that no one puts bins into car lanes, making cars weave into other lanes to avoid hitting them, but I’ve seen several sketchy situations with bikers having to hop into the car lane and getting very closely passed as a result.

Some bins are consistently not in the bikelane, but rather in the driveway or on the grass, and I’m very grateful to the people choosing their bin location carefully!

This chart currently only includes my data - if you’d like to contribute and fill in the gaps, stay tuned for a submission form!

Can you guess which days are trash days?
